case_title: DAVID TULLIS VS. AUSTIN FERRARI, et al

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 FILED BY DEFENDANT FERRARI, AUSTIN FERRARI, ANTONIO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-07-2022 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TULLIS, DAVID RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERRARI, AUSTIN $7,816.40 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,891.40, CLAIM AGAINST ANTONIO FERRARI IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE INDICATED) SERVED JAN-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI, AUSTIN
PROOF OF PERSONAL SERVICE TO AUSTIN FERRARI **AMENDED** FILED BY PLAINTIFF TULLIS, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI, AUSTIN
DECLARATION CHANGE OF ADDRESS(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT FERRARI, AUSTIN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT INDICATED) SERVED JAN-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI, ANTONIO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-07-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-07-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF DAVID TULLIS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AUSTIN FERRARI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANTONIO FERRARI IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 **GRANTED**
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,139.00 FILED BY TULLIS, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI, AUSTIN FERRARI, ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-07-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE OF AUSTIN FERRARI **AMENDED** - ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AMENDING FEB-09-2022 PROOF OF SERVICE)(FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT INDICATED) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TULLIS, DAVID SERVED JAN-20-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FERRARI, AUSTIN
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. FILED BY TULLIS, DAVID FERRARI, AUSTIN FERRARI, ANTONIO
